entries: **Usage charts group days by your local time, not UTC**: the daily/weekly/monthly aggregates bucketed each entry by its UTC calendar day, so usage in the local pre-dawn hours (e.g. 00:00–08:00 at UTC+8) was credited to the previous day; timestamps are now converted to local time before bucketing, matching the HTML report.

**Archived Codex sessions are no longer undercounted**: usage now scans `~/.codex/archived_sessions/` alongside `~/.codex/sessions/`, so Codex sessions that have been archived still count toward your totals (no change when that directory doesn't exist).
